headline: Littelfuse Appoints Anne-Marie D’Angelo as Chief Legal Officer and Corporate Secretary
summary: CHICAGO, April 21, 2026--Littelfuse, Inc. (NASDAQ: LFUS), a leader in developing smart solutions that enable safe and efficient electrical energy transfer, today announced that Anne‑Marie D’Angelo will join the company as Chief Legal Officer and Corporate Secretary, effective May 1, 2026.
